definition: a biologist is a scientist who studies living things like plants and animals
example: As a biologist, Mohamed is mostly interested in human genes.

definition: access to something is permission to use it
example: The price includes access to various online resources.

definition: particularly means more than usual or especially
example: I was particularly impressed by Prof. Lacquet’s class today.

definition: something that is tiny is very, very small
example: The baby’s hands are tiny.

definition: a scientist is a person who studies or works in science
example: Albert Einstein was a famous scientist.

definition: an author is a person who writes books
example: Burton wants to be an author and write novels.

definition: a marine biologist is someone who studies the animals and plants that live in the ocean
example: Kenshin is a marine biologist and is studying whales in South America.

definition: if you explore a topic, you study it carefully to try to understand more about it
example: I’d like to explore more about how to write a good essay.

definition: salmon is a type of fish that is pink
example: Salmon is the most delicious fish and is healthy as well.

definition: if something causes something to happen, it makes it happen
example: Be careful when using oil near a flame as it can cause a fire.

definition: pastry is a food that is made from flour, water, and fat
example: Apple pie is a popular pastry in the U.S.

definition: history is the study of the past and important events that happened
example: In history today, we learned about the brothers who built the first plane.

definition: biology is the study of living things
example: Jiang studies hard for biology and wants to be a doctor.

definition: if you respond to something, you give an answer with words or an action
example: Graciela offered Sven a drink, but he didn’t respond.

definition: something that is scientific is connected to science and the studies done
example: New scientific discoveries are being made every day.

definition: someone who is curious asks many questions about something
example: The children were curious during their science class.

definition: if you cycle, you ride a bicycle
example: Many people cycle rather than drive in Amsterdam.

definition: a memory is something that you remember from the past
example: Zhong has lots of happy memories from his childhood.

definition: a project is an activity with many different parts
example: We have a group project to do in this course.

definition: if something affects something else, it makes it change
example: Getting too little sleep affects Mia’s concentration.

definition: research is the study of something in lots of detail
example: Horst is still doing research for his PhD.

definition: something that is ancient is very, very old
example: Jenna found an ancient coin in the sand on the beach.

definition: an interest is wanting to know more about something
example: Sasha has an interest in classical music.

definition: somewhere that is calm is relaxing and not loud
example: The city was calm and quiet again after the weekend’s concert.

definition: an organization is an official group of people who work together to achieve a purpose
example: The organization has raised a lot of money to help people build new homes.

definition: if you go hiking, you go for a long walk, usually in the countryside or mountains go hiking
example: We’re going to do some hiking this summer.

definition: a tropical place is somewhere that is very hot throughout the year
example: Thailand and the Philippines are both tropical countries.

definition: a skater is someone who goes roller skating or ice skating
example: The skater seemed to fly over the ice with graceful movements.

definition: a change is a new experience of something you haven’t done or seen before
example: Amalia needed a change, so she decided to do some volunteer work.

definition: if you inspire someone, you make them want to do something or feel that they are able to do it
example: Léandre inspires her team to work harder.

definition: a researcher is someone who studies a topic very carefully and in detail, usually to solve a problem
example: The researcher is studying how people learn to speak different languages.

definition: something that is rare is very unusual or uncommon
example: That bird is very rare in this country.

definition: if you have access to something, you are able to use it
example: Does the apartment have access to a garden?

definition: a detective is a police officer who investigates the truth about a crime
example: An experienced detective was assigned to the case.

definition: if you skim something, you read through it quickly and not in detail
example: It took Joe five minutes to skim through the whole book.

definition: a habit is something you do often without thinking about it
example: Exercising every day is a good habit.

definition: your personality is all of the qualities that make you different from other people
example: Alva has a very positive personality.

definition: an opinion is what you think about something or someone
example: Ronaldo has a good opinion of Paula and thinks that she’s a nice person.

definition: a strategy is an organized plan to do something
example: The football team won the game because they had a good strategy.

definition: a profile is a short description of someone
example: Jihoon’s profile on Facebook says he loves playing football.

definition: a connection is a link between things
example: There is a connection between the two people as they have the same surname.

definition: a reason is a fact that explains why something is how it is
example: Remember to give a reason for your answer.

definition: a person who is friendly is kind and pleasant to other people
example: Gemma is a friendly person who visits everyone.

definition: wildlife is the animals, birds, and plants that live free from people
example: We saw so much wildlife when we went hiking in Kenya.

definition: if you say you spend time doing something, you use your time to do it
example: I like to spend my time painting pictures of the mountains near my house.

definition: a phrase is a group of words that are part of a sentence but don’t have a subject and a verb
example: Zhu learned a new phrase while reading the story.

definition: the purpose of something is the reason for it
example: The main purpose of the company is to print textbooks.

definition: if you get to know someone, you learn about them by spending time with them
example: Anton and Beatriz are trying to get to know their new neighbor.

definition: if you judge something, you think about it carefully and decide how you feel
example: Athena was asked to judge the singing competition and choose a winner.

definition: if you tend to do something, you usually do it
example: Adam tends to fall asleep in front of the TV in the evening.

definition: something that is usual is normal or common
example: It took Aleksi longer than usual to drive to work this morning.

definition: if you express something, you say what you think or feel about it
example: Meredith’s wide smile expressed her happiness.

definition: an aspect of something is a part of it
example: The training program covers every aspect of the job.

definition: a blog post is a story or a piece of writing that someone puts onto the internet for other people to read
example: Bjorn tries to write a blog post every week about the places people should visit.

definition: social media are websites or apps that people use to make friends and keep in contact with each other
example: Alberto likes using social media sites like Instagram and TikTok.

definition: something that is factual has information that includes only facts
example: Newspaper articles should be factual.

definition: an aisle is a space to walk between rows of seats
example: You walk down the aisle to get to your seat on a bus, train, or plane.

definition: a topic is a subject that you write or talk about
example: We need to think more carefully about this topic before writing the essay.

definition: something that is common happens often or is in large numbers
example: Snow is common in Canada during the winter.

definition: a review is an article in a newspaper or magazine, or online, that says a book, movie, play, game, etc. is good or bad
example: The review was so positive that I wanted to read the book.

definition: an idea is a thought or a picture of something you have in your mind
example: The surprise party was Niamh’s idea.

definition: if you suggest something, you offer an idea for people to think about
example: I suggest you take a taxi to the museum this afternoon.

definition: your character is all the things that make you different from others
example: His character is a mix of kindness and friendliness.

definition: your DNA is the tiny things in your body that contain information about you
example: Scientists are trying to use DNA to grow some animals in labs.

definition: an experience is something that you take part in
example: Going overseas as a child was a great experience.

definition: a psychologist is a person whose job is to study how people’s minds work
example: Vicente is studying to be a psychologist because he likes helping people.

definition: something that is similar is nearly the same as something else
example: Laurie and Laura have similar names.

definition: if you believe something, you think it is true
example: Matthias believes that the people around him are good.

definition: a leader is a person who tells a group of people what to do
example: The leader told the group what they needed to do in their new job.

definition: your behavior is the way you do things
example: Saadiyah’s behavior in class is always very good.

definition: a relationship is how two or more people are connected to each other
example: Hussein and Sumaiyah have a close relationship as brother and sister.

definition: a choice is when you choose between two things
example: Your choice of clothing today is great.

definition: an extrovert is someone who prefers being with other people
example: Valentina is an extrovert. She talks to everyone.

definition: an introvert is someone who prefers being on their own
example: Cruz is an introvert. He is shy with people he doesn’t know well.

definition: someone who is quiet talks very little around people
example: Yaseen is a rather quiet person who doesn’t like to talk much.

definition: if you observe something, you watch it
example: Marcel likes to observe people around him.

definition: if you say that someone is the center of attention, you mean that everyone around them are watching them
example: Marielana loves to be the center of attention at parties.

definition: an infographic is a picture that gives information
example: The infographic makes it easier to understand the information about personalities.

definition: if you say you go for walks, you mean you spend time walking for exercise or to relax
example: Katyrzyna and Ewa like to go for walks in the park.

definition: if something happens occasionally, it happens sometimes
example: Kathy occasionally goes to the movies alone.

definition: if something happens rarely, it does not happen often
example: Marek rarely eats dinner at restaurants.

definition: something that is regular happens often
example: The store has a lot of regular customers who shop there every day.

definition: exercise is when you move your body to keep it healthy and strong
example: Playing football is good exercise.

definition: a description is information or details about what a person is like
example: Lin wrote a short description about himself.

definition: something that is specific refers to one person or thing
example: Try to be as specific as possible when you ask a question.

definition: a gym is a place where you can go to do exercise
example: Maja loves to use the running machines at the gym.

definition: traffic is the amount of vehicles on the road
example: There was so much traffic after work that it took Leanne one hour to get home.

definition: yoga is a type of exercise that helps you stretch your muscles and breathe
example: Ida goes to yoga classes every day to relax.

definition: if you expect something, you think it will happen
example: I expect Jan to get home at 6 p.m.

definition: something that is terrible is very bad
example: Jiro had a terrible dream last night that upset him.

definition: if you eat out, you eat in a restaurant
example: Rosa and her family often eat out at restaurants.

definition: if you get up, you leave your bed after sleeping
example: I usually get up at 5:00 a.m. during the week so I can get to work by 7:00 a.m.

definition: a characteristic is a common or special quality of a person, group, action, or thing
example: Being friendly is a good characteristic.

definition: an option is something that you can choose
example: Traveling for a year after college is an option for Gustavo.

definition: if you say you are your best self, you mean you are getting the most out of life
example: Melania feels she is her best self when she is with her friends.

definition: a situation is what is happening in a place at a specific time
example: Elaine thought the situation was funny.

definition: an interviewer is a person who asks questions to find out more about someone
example: The interviewer asked Aino many questions.

definition: an expression is the act of telling or showing thoughts or feelings
example: Everyone gave an expression of agreement at the meeting.

definition: if you introduce someone to another person, you tell that other person about the first person
example: Let me introduce you to Raj.

definition: a speaker is a person who is talking
example: The speaker tonight is a well-known scientist.

definition: something that is said strongly is said louder or slower than other words
example: Ren said the main words in his question strongly.

definition: a person who is comfortable feels pleasant and calm
example: Zoltan is comfortable speaking Italian, Russian, and English.

definition: a person who is confident trusts that a situation will happen as they expect it
example: I feel confident that we will win.

definition: a person who is reliable always does what they say they will do
example: Ask Marlon to help you. He’s such a reliable person.

definition: an event is a competition, party, or race that is done at a specific time
example: Nate’s birthday was a major event each year when he was a child.

definition: an excerpt is a short piece of text from a longer text
example: Read the excerpt from the story, then answer the questions.

definition: something that fits someone feels right for that person
example: Being a doctor fits Amelia. She’s really good at it.

definition: someone who is serious is not smiling or laughing
example: Everyone looked serious as they listened to the president’s speech.

definition: if something happens naturally, it happens with certainty or without doubt
example: Naturally, Johann will drive us to the theater on Saturday.

definition: you use either to choose between two or more things
example: Watch either movie. They’re both good!

definition: these days are the present time, over a short period
example: Kimiko prefers reading to watching TV these days.

definition: you use definitely to show that you are very sure of something
example: The team will definitely win if Hae-Jun plays in the game.

definition: you use absolutely to mean really, completely, or for sure
example: Kaito didn’t sleep last night, so he’s absolutely exhausted today.

definition: a person who is creative is good at thinking of and doing new things
example: Sanjay is so creative with the way he uses colors in his artwork.

definition: a person who is honest always tells the truth
example: Thank you for being so honest with me.

definition: a person who is patient is calm when they have to wait for something
example: Tai is very patient with young children.

definition: someone who is professional does something well in a job or an activity
example: The reporter was very professional when they interviewed Alexis.

definition: if you emphasize something, you show that it is more important than the other things
example: Use capital letters to emphasize a word in writing.

definition: someone who is direct says what they mean
example: Celia is very direct, but she’s not rude.

definition: something that is crazy is strange or silly
example: Feroz’s ideas can seem a bit crazy at times, but they usually end well.

definition: someone who is easygoing is relaxed and does not stress easily
example: Jia is a fun and easygoing person.

definition: someone who is talented is very good at something
example: Olaf is talented at playing the piano.

definition: if you graduate, you finish a qualification, like a diploma or a degree
example: Ilan can’t wait to graduate from university.

definition: marketing is a job that helps to promote and sell products and services to people in marketing
example: Juhee has many friends who work in marketing.

definition: advertising is a job of designing notices to sell products and services to people in advertising
example: Sumit works in advertising and is good at selling things.

definition: a person who is generous is kind and gives things to other people or does things for them
example: Granny was very generous with the amount of money she gave me this year.

definition: karate is a sport or way of fighting
example: Ricardo enjoys learning karate as it’s good exercise.

definition: if you join someone, you meet or come together with them
example: Join us tonight for coffee and cake.

definition: if you deal with something, you give it your attention and solve the problem
example: Maura needs to deal with her stress better.

definition: if you make a suggestion, you offer an idea for someone to think about make a suggestion
example: Qiang made a great suggestion in the meeting yesterday.

definition: if you mention something, you don’t give many details about it
example: I’ll mention your ideas to Jacinta.

definition: a stranger is a person you do not know
example: Miya spoke to a stranger while waiting for her bus.

definition: if you show your interest, you say that something is interesting to you
example: Show your interest in people by listening to them.

definition: if you say you have free time, you mean you are not busy with anything spend (your) free time
example: In his free time, Istvan likes to play computer games.

definition: if you say someone is a morning person, you mean someone works better in the mornings than the evenings
example: Sehee is a morning person. She wakes up at 5 a.m.

definition: if you adapt to something, you change to fit it
example: The writer is going to adapt her book into a movie.

definition: if you sign up for something, you join it sign up to, sign up for
example: Remember to sign up for the trip to Milan next week.

definition: if you exchange something with someone, you give each other something
example: Amy and Sylvie exchange presents on their birthdays.

definition: a checklist is a list of things you need to do or have for something
example: Use a checklist to make sure you’ve done everything you need to do before your vacation.

definition: feedback is what someone tells you about something you have done
example: Elsie asked her teacher for feedback on her homework.

definition: a site (website) is a place on the internet that has information or pictures about something
example: Ambrocio likes to read sites with interesting facts.

definition: if you say rather than, you mean instead of
example: He’d do anything rather than upset someone.

definition: a response is a reply or answer to a question
example: The company did not give a response to my email.

definition: if you develop something, you create something new
example: We are trying to develop a new way to sell this product.

definition: a community is a group of people who share a way of living, interests, jobs, etc.
example: The community is creating a shared garden where everyone can grow vegetables.

definition: a report is a description of something that happens, like an event
example: Please try to keep the report to a maximum of five pages.

definition: something that is suitable is right for a specific purpose
example: My apartment is in a suitable location, with many things to see and do.

definition: something that is current is happening at this time
example: Siiri loves her current job.

definition: if something matches something else, it fits well with that thing
example: Juho’s shirt matches Laurie’s shirt today.
